index.title: Uppy - Co-op Balloon Game
index.description: Uppy is a multiplayer co-op balloon survival game. Tap near the balloon to keep it from falling, dodge birds and ghosts, and work with teammates for higher scores.
index.og_description: Protect the balloon with your team! Tap, cooperate, survive.
index.hero_desc: A multiplayer co-op survival game that tests teamwork. Tap the balloon with teammates, dodge obstacles, and chase higher scores. Simple rules, complex coordination.
index.precision_desc: Tap near the balloon to create an upward draft against gravity. Each tap has a cooldown — strategize your timing.
index.leaderboard_desc: Compete for high scores against players worldwide, with weekly rankings
index.guide_tap_desc: Tap when the balloon is about to fall to keep it rising
index.guide_cooldown_desc: Time your taps wisely to avoid cooldown gaps
index.guide_team_desc: Communicate with teammates to ensure continuous tapping
index.guide_challenge_desc: Break records and climb the leaderboard
index.footer_tagline: A real-time multiplayer co-op balloon game that tests teamwork and strategy.

play.title: Uppy - Co-op Balloon Game
play.nickname_hint: Enter a nickname to start your balloon adventure
play.tip1: Tap near the balloon to push it up
play.tip2: Birds and ghosts end the game on contact
play.tip3: Tap near ghosts to push them away
play.tip4: Watch the wind indicator in the HUD
play.solo_hint: Solo play supported; share the room code to invite friends!

tutorial.step1: Tap near the balloon to push it up (tapping too far won't work)
tutorial.step2: Wait for the cooldown bar to turn green; more players = longer cooldown
tutorial.step3: Avoid birds and ghosts; tap near ghosts to push them away; watch the wind

leaderboard_page.description: Uppy Co-op Balloon Game Leaderboard — Team high scores.
leaderboard_page.heading: Leaderboard
leaderboard_page.subtitle: Compete with players worldwide and see who's the top balloon guardian
